task_description: Implement advanced search filters for the music search app, allowing users to filter by entity type (Song/Artist/Album), sort results (Relevance/Release Date/Artist Name), and clear all filters. Filters are managed via URL search params and update results without page refresh.

verification.summary: Build (bun run build) and lint (bun run lint) both pass cleanly. No test framework configured. Semantic review approved (v2) with only minor non-blocking observations.
